{% extends 'layout.html' %} {% set pageTitle = "What is the members National Insurance number?"%} {% block pageTitle %} {{pageTitle}} - {{serviceName}} {% endblock %} {% block beforeContent %} {% endblock %} {% block outerContent %} {% endblock %} {% block content %}
Member details {% call fieldset({ legend: { text: pageTitle, classes: "nhsuk-fieldset__legend--l", isPageHeading: true } })%} {{ input({ label: { text: "National Insurance number" }, hint: { text: "This can be found on your National Insurance card, benefit letter, payslip or P60 (for example, \‘QQ 12 34 56 C’)\." }, id: "natInsNum", name: "natInsNum", spellcheck: false, classes: "nhsuk-input--width-10" }) }} {% endcall %} {{ button({ "text": "Continue" }) }}
{% endblock %}
